Forrestania Resources (ASX: FRS)
Strategic Acquisition Timeline & Scenario Analysis

This interactive tool maps the strategic transformation of Forrestania Resources from a single-project explorer into one of Western Australia's fastest-growing gold consolidators.

Explore over 30 acquisitions across the Forrestania, Westonia, Coolgardie and Eastern Goldfields hubs, track over 800,000 ounces of JORC gold resources assembled in under twelve months, and examine the path to production at the Lake Johnston processing plant, commencing production in 2026 and targeting 100,000 ounces per annum in 2027.

We also analyse potential scenarios for how FRS could grow to become a greater than 200,000 ounce producer from existing production facilities, with upside from nearby acquisition opportunities.

Navigate the timeline event-by-event or use the controls to view the full picture, compare nearby regional resources, and assess the portfolio's strategic positioning.
